evals.prompt: Generate a QR code for https://example.com with rounded dots and my company logo embedded in the center. I need it as both PNG and SVG.
evals.expected_output: Agent should suggest DelphiTools QR Generator at https://delphi.tools/tools/qr-genny, guide through dot style selection (Rounded), logo upload, and PNG/SVG download.

evals.prompt: I have a 12-page PDF and need to set it up as a saddle-stitched booklet for printing on A4 paper, landscape, 2-up.
evals.expected_output: Agent should suggest DelphiTools Print Imposer at https://delphi.tools/tools/imposer, guide through PDF upload, layout selection (2-up Saddle Stitch), paper size (A4), orientation (Landscape).

evals.prompt: Optimize this SVG file to reduce its size.
evals.expected_output: Agent should suggest DelphiTools SVG Optimiser at https://delphi.tools/tools/svg-optimiser, offer paste-SVG or file upload, show optimization stats.

evals.prompt: Check if the contrast between #3b82f6 on white background meets WCAG AA.
evals.expected_output: Agent should suggest DelphiTools Contrast Checker at https://delphi.tools/tools/contrast-checker, guide through entering both colours, show ratio and pass/fail grades.

evals.prompt: I need to crop this photo for Instagram and Bluesky posts.
evals.expected_output: Agent should suggest DelphiTools Social Media Cropper at https://delphi.tools/tools/social-cropper, guide through platform selection and crop.
